status.message: Cannot invoke "java.util.UUID.toString()" because the return value of "com.kosign.wetax.domain.pos.POSSaleMaster.getGuid()" is null

notes.UR-08: RESOLVED — 'invoices' is the correct wrapper key (accepted, though NPE on lookup). 'data' key returns 'must not be empty' (server ignores it).
notes.UR-09: UNRESOLVABLE — cannot confirm error_message field presence because our ref_id has no matching order GUID in the system. The NPE suggests ref_id format mismatch (server may expect UUID format).
notes.UR-10: RESOLVED — response status pattern is {success: bool, message: string}, NOT {code: string, message: string} as OpenAPI documented. Matches the PDF sample pattern.
notes.server_bug: NPE when looking up ref_id — server expects internal GUID, not our ref_id format. This may mean sendOrderInfo does not store ref_id in a way invoices-status can look up immediately.
